name: RDP Communication over Loopback Address
notes:
This rule detects RDP communication over loopback address.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden
SIGMA Title: RDP over Reverse SSH Tunnel WFP
SIGMA Description: Detects svchost hosting RDP termsvcs communicating with the loopback address


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Access Permitted

when the event matches (sourceport==3389 and (str(destinationaddress) matches '127.*' or str(destinationaddress) matches '::1')) OR (destinationport == 3389 and (str(sourceaddress) matches '127.*' or str(sourceaddress) matches '::1')) AQL filter query
when the event matches (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%thor.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%thor64.exe') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY RDP Communication over Loopback Address on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Access Permitted

AND when the event matches (sourceport==3389 and (str(destinationaddress) matches '127.*' or str(destinationaddress) matches '::1')) OR (destinationport == 3389 and (str(sourceaddress) matches '127.*' or str(sourceaddress) matches '::1')) AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%thor.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%thor64.exe') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: RDP Communication over Loopback Address
Event description: Detects RDP communication over loopback address.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
